skills.classification_rationale: 执行成对序列比对以判断相似性，主要交付是分析结果。

skills.name: bio-alignment-sorting
skills.summary: bio-alignment-sorting

skills.classification_rationale: 按坐标或序列关系对比对记录排序，主要交付是规范化文件。

skills.name: bio-alignment-validation

skills.task: 验证序列比对质量

skills.name: bio-atac-seq-atac-peak-calling

skills.task: 调用染色质可及性峰
skills.classification_rationale: 使用MACS3从ATAC-seq比对数据中识别开放染色质区域，产出峰列表及信号轨迹。

skills.name: bio-atac-seq-atac-qc
skills.summary: Quality control metrics for ATAC-seq data including fragment size distribution, TSS enrichment, FRiP, and library complexity. Use when assessing ATAC-seq library quality before or after peak calling to identify problematic samples.
skills.task: 评估染色质数据质量
skills.classification_rationale: 计算片段大小分布、TSS富集、FRiP及文库复杂度等指标，产出ATAC-seq质量控制报告。

skills.name: bio-atac-seq-differential-accessibility
skills.summary: Find differentially accessible chromatin regions between conditions using DiffBind or DESeq2. Use when comparing chromatin accessibility between treatment groups, cell types, or developmental stages in ATAC-seq experiments.
skills.task: 染色质可及性差异分析
skills.classification_rationale: 使用DiffBind或DESeq2对ATAC-seq数据进行差异可及性区域分析，产出差异峰列表。

skills.name: bio-atac-seq-footprinting
skills.summary: Detect transcription factor binding sites through footprinting analysis in ATAC-seq data using TOBIAS. Use when identifying TF occupancy patterns within accessible regions, as TF binding protects DNA from Tn5 cutting.
skills.task: 转录因子结合足迹分析
skills.classification_rationale: 使用TOBIAS在ATAC-seq数据中检测转录因子结合足迹，产出结合位点预测结果。

skills.name: bio-atac-seq-motif-deviation
skills.summary: Analyze transcription factor motif accessibility variability using chromVAR. Use when identifying which TF motifs show variable accessibility across samples or conditions in ATAC-seq data.
skills.task: 基序可及性变异分析
skills.classification_rationale: 使用chromVAR计算TF基序的可及性偏差分数，产出变异性和差异基序列表。

skills.name: bio-atac-seq-nucleosome-positioning
skills.summary: Extract nucleosome positions from ATAC-seq data using NucleoATAC, ATACseqQC, and fragment analysis. Use when analyzing chromatin organization, identifying nucleosome-free regions at promoters, or characterizing nucleosome occupancy patterns from ATAC-seq fragment size distributions.
skills.task: 核小体定位特征提取
skills.classification_rationale: 使用NucleoATAC等工具从ATAC-seq片段中提取核小体位置，产出核小体占据图谱。

skills.name: bio-basecalling
skills.summary: Convert raw Nanopore signal data (FAST5/POD5) to nucleotide sequences using Dorado basecaller. Covers model selection, GPU acceleration, modified base detection, and quality filtering. Use when processing raw Nanopore data before alignment. Guppy is deprecated; use Dorado for all new analyses.
skills.task: 纳米孔测序碱基识别
skills.classification_rationale: 使用Dorado将纳米孔原始电信号转换为核苷酸序列，产出FASTQ/BAM序列文件。

skills.name: bio-codon-usage
skills.summary: bio-codon-usage
skills.task: 密码子使用偏好分析
skills.classification_rationale: 使用Biopython计算密码子适应性指数和偏好性，产出密码子使用统计报告。

skills.name: bio-crispr-screens-batch-correction
skills.summary: Batch effect correction for CRISPR screens. Covers normalization across batches, technical replicate handling, and batch-aware analysis. Use when combining screens from multiple batches or correcting systematic technical variation.
skills.task: CRISPR筛选批次校正
skills.classification_rationale: 对CRISPR筛选的sgRNA计数进行归一化和批次效应去除，产出校正后的计数矩阵。

skills.name: bio-crispr-screens-crispresso-editing
skills.summary: CRISPResso2 for analyzing CRISPR gene editing outcomes. Quantifies indels, HDR efficiency, and generates comprehensive editing reports. Use when analyzing amplicon sequencing data from CRISPR editing experiments to assess editing efficiency.
skills.task: CRISPR基因编辑结果分析
skills.classification_rationale: 使用CRISPResso2分析扩增子测序数据以量化indel和HDR效率，产出编辑效率报告。

skills.name: bio-crispr-screens-hit-calling
skills.summary: Statistical methods for calling hits in CRISPR screens. Covers MAGeCK, BAGEL2, drugZ, and custom approaches for identifying essential and resistance genes. Use when identifying significant genes from screen count data after QC passes.
skills.task: 筛选命中基因统计鉴定
skills.classification_rationale: 使用MAGeCK、BAGEL2等统计方法从CRISPR筛选计数数据中鉴定显著基因，主要产物为命中基因列表。

skills.name: bio-crispr-screens-jacks-analysis
skills.summary: JACKS (Joint Analysis of CRISPR/Cas9 Knockout Screens) for modeling sgRNA efficacy and gene essentiality. Use when analyzing multiple CRISPR screens simultaneously or when accounting for variable sgRNA efficiency across experiments.

skills.classification_rationale: 使用JACKS贝叶斯模型联合分析多个CRISPR筛选实验，主要产物为基因必需性评分和sgRNA效率估计。

skills.name: bio-crispr-screens-library-design
skills.summary: CRISPR library design for genetic screens. Covers sgRNA selection, library composition, control design, and oligo ordering. Use when designing custom sgRNA libraries for knockout, activation, or interference screens.

skills.classification_rationale: 主要产物是遗传筛选实验文库设计，包含 sgRNA、文库组成、对照和订购方案。

skills.name: bio-crispr-screens-mageck-analysis
skills.summary: MAGeCK (Model-based Analysis of Genome-wide CRISPR-Cas9 Knockout) for pooled CRISPR screen analysis. Covers count normalization, gene ranking, and pathway analysis. Use when identifying essential genes, drug targets, or resistance mechanisms from dropout or enrichment screens.
skills.task: 筛选基因显著性排序分析
skills.classification_rationale: 使用MAGeCK对CRISPR筛选数据进行计数归一化和稳健秩聚合基因排序，主要产物为基因显著性排名表。

skills.name: bio-crispr-screens-screen-qc
skills.summary: Quality control for pooled CRISPR screens. Covers library representation, read distribution, replicate correlation, and essential gene recovery. Use when assessing screen quality before hit calling or diagnosing poor screen performance.
skills.task: 筛选数据质量控制评估
skills.classification_rationale: 评估CRISPR筛选的文库代表性、Gini指数、重复相关性和必需基因回收率等质量指标，主要产物为质量控制报告。

skills.name: bio-fragment-analysis
skills.summary: Analyzes cfDNA fragment size distributions and fragmentomics features using FinaleToolkit or Griffin. Extracts nucleosome positioning patterns, fragment ratios, and DELFI-style fragmentation profiles for cancer detection. Use when leveraging fragment patterns for tumor detection or tissue-of-origin analysis.
skills.task: 片段组学特征提取分析
skills.classification_rationale: 从cfDNA测序数据中提取片段大小分布、短长比和核小体定位等片段组学特征，主要产物为片段化特征矩阵。

skills.name: bio-genome-engineering-base-editing-design
skills.summary: Design guides for cytosine and adenine base editing using editing window optimization and BE-Hive outcome prediction. Select optimal positions for C-to-T or A-to-G conversions without double-strand breaks. Use when designing base editor experiments for precise nucleotide changes.
skills.task: 碱基编辑引导序列设计
skills.classification_rationale: 根据编辑窗口优化和旁观者效应预测设计CBE或ABE碱基编辑引导序列，主要产物为候选引导序列及编辑效率预测。

skills.name: bio-genome-engineering-grna-design

skills.name: biomcp

Use for gene function, variant pathogenicity, trials, diagnostics, drug safety, pathway context, disease workups, and literature evidence.

Also triggers when the user says "help me search for papers on X", "build a search strategy", "what are the MeSH...

Use this skill when conducting multi-step biomedical research including CRISPR screening design, single-cell RNA-seq analysis, ADMET prediction, GWAS interpretation, rare disease diagnosis, or lab protocol optimization. Leverages LLM reasoning with code execution...

skills.name: biopython

Best for batch processing, custom bioinformatics pipelines, BLAST automation. For quick lookups use gget; for multi-service integration use bioservices.
skills.task: 生物序列与科研文件批处理

skills.name: biopython-molecular-biology

Use for batch processing, custom pipelines, format conversion, PubMed/GenBank queries. For quick gene lookups use gget; for multi-service REST APIs use bioservices.
skills.task: 分子生物学序列与文件处理

Use for gene family studies, phylogenomics, comparative genomics, NCBI pipelines. For PCR/restriction/cloning use biopython-molecular-biology; for SAM/BAM use pysam.

skills.name: biorxiv-database

skills.name: cfd-orchestrator
skills.summary: Top-level CFD scientist orchestrator. Reads a user CFD topic, picks one route, initializes a run directory, and invokes the first skill of a fixed chain. From that point on, every per-stage skill's `## Next` block names the next skill, and the agent walks the chain to a finished paper. No user shell commands between stages.
skills.task: CFD主题到案例路线编排
skills.classification_rationale: 读取主题、选择路线并初始化运行目录，主要交付是研究流程规划。

skills.name: cfd-paper
skills.summary: Full paper writing in skill mode. ONE skill that walks the agent through a strict numbered protocol: Stage 0 experiment planner, then a planner-viz-writer-compile-reviewer-revise cycle that iterates until the reviewer returns pass=true or the cap is hit. Each phase is one concrete agent action with the LLM prompt embedded verbatim and an immediate schema-validation gate. No script delegation. The agent itself is t...
skills.task: CFD实验计划结果与论文写作流程
skills.classification_rationale: 原始 SKILL.md 是完整 CFD 研究论文生成和审阅循环，领域按研究对象归入计算工程与流体仿真。

skills.name: cfd-paper-writer
skills.summary: General-purpose academic paper writer skill for CFD research, adapted from Master-cai/Research-Paper-Writing-Skills with CFD-domain overlays. Embeds section-by-section structural guidance (Abstract / Introduction / Related Work / Methods / Experiments / Discussion / Conclusion), Master-cai's reviewer rubric, and a claim-evidence-citation discipline. Used by cfd-paper Phase D (writer / reviser) and Phase F (reviewe...
skills.task: CFD研究论文组织与撰写
skills.classification_rationale: 原始 SKILL.md 产出 CFD 研究论文，领域按研究对象归入计算工程与流体仿真。

skills.name: cfd-pipeline
skills.summary: Top-level CFD Scientist research pipeline. Chains the cfd-* sub-skills end-to-end — literature → hypothesis → mesh-gate → experiments → analysis → paper. Routes to code-mod / open-ended / general subflows based on intent. Self-contained — embeds MetricSetupAgent + MetricSetupVerifier prompts verbatim for the metric-setup stage.
skills.task: CFD文献假设网格实验与分析流程规划
skills.classification_rationale: 串联文献、假设、网格、实验和分析阶段，主要交付是科研流程计划。

skills.name: cfd-requirements
skills.summary: Convert hypotheses (or a direct simulation request) into FoamAgent-ready user-requirement strings, one per case. Self-contained — embeds the IdeationAgent + HypothesisAgent expert prompts verbatim. Use after cfd-hypothesis (general flow) or directly when the user gave a simulation-only request. Outputs requirements.json.
skills.task: CFD假设到可执行案例需求转换
skills.classification_rationale: 把仿真假设转换为每个案例的可执行需求，主要交付是流程输入规范。

skills.name: cfd-research
skills.summary: Top-level CFD research entry — alias for cfd-skills/cfd-pipeline (general path). Use when the user gives a CFD research topic and wants the full literature → hypothesis → mesh-gate → experiments → analysis → paper flow. The full self-contained recipe lives in cfd-skills/cfd-pipeline/SKILL.md.
skills.task: CFD主题到研究流程路线规划
skills.classification_rationale: 把CFD主题路由到文献、设计、执行和分析路线，主要交付是流程规划。

skills.name: cfd-stats
skills.summary: Numerical analysis patterns for OpenFOAM run outputs — log parsing, D²-law fits, slope/RMSE/Richardson extrapolation, residual-plateau checks, drift checks. Self-contained — the agent writes 30-line Python snippets via Bash using these patterns. No Python wrapper.
skills.task: CFD日志QoI拟合与残差分析
skills.classification_rationale: 解析OpenFOAM输出并计算拟合、误差、外推和残差指标，主要交付是分析结果。

skills.name: cfd-viz
skills.summary: Generate PyVista figures from a CFD case. Two modes — interpret (per-case diagnostics for cfd-interpret) and full (publication-quality cross-case figures for cfd-paper). Self-contained — embeds viz_quality and vision QA prompts verbatim. Agent writes and runs the PyVista script directly; the batch helper is optional.
skills.task: CFD场结果诊断与论文图生成
skills.classification_rationale: 原始 SKILL.md 使用 PyVista 生成 CFD 流场诊断与论文图；可视化是功能，不应把领域误写为计算机视觉。

skills.name: chai1
skills.summary: Structure prediction for protein, nucleic-acid, and small-molecule complexes with the Chai-1 foundation model (Chai Discovery 2024, github.com/chaidiscovery/chai-lab). Reach for this skill to predict an antibody-antigen or protein-ligand complex from a single FASTA, to re-fold designed binders as an AlphaFold-multimer alternative, or to drive co-folding from Python for batched campaigns on a GPU.
skills.task: 蛋白核酸配体复合物结构预测
skills.classification_rationale: 描述是 Chai-1 对蛋白、核酸和小分子复合物进行结构预测。

skills.name: chart-image-generator
skills.summary: Generate publication-quality chart images from research data
skills.task: 生成学术出版图表
skills.classification_rationale: 主要动作为根据研究数据配置期刊样式并绘制图表，主要产物为符合投稿分辨率与格式要求的图表图像文件。

skills.name: checking-chembl
skills.summary: Checking ChEMBL for Structured SAR Data
skills.task: 药物化学论文 ChEMBL 收录检查
skills.classification_rationale: 描述的核心动作是检查药物化学论文是否有 ChEMBL 结构化生物活性数据，属于明确的资料检索。

skills.name: Checking ChEMBL for Structured SAR Data
skills.summary: Check if medicinal chemistry papers are in ChEMBL database to access curated bioactivity data
skills.task: 论文结构化 SAR 数据收录检查
skills.classification_rationale: 描述的唯一明确动作是检查药物化学论文是否被 ChEMBL 收录并存在结构化活性数据，属于检索获取。

skills.name: checkpoint-management
skills.summary: Use when creating, reading, or updating workflow checkpoint files (workflow-state.json, progress.log, init.sh) — the file-centric state system for cross-session computational workflows
skills.task: 管理工作流检查点状态
skills.classification_rationale: 主要动作为创建、读取和更新工作流检查点文件以跟踪计算阶段状态，主要产物为workflow-state.json等跨会话状态记录文件。

skills.name: chem-bond-dissociation
skills.summary: Calculate homolytic and heterolytic bond dissociation energies (BDEs) for all single bonds in a molecule using MLIPs with RDKit fragmentation.
skills.task: 分子键解离能计算与比较
skills.classification_rationale: 计算单键均裂和异裂解离能，主要产物是分子性质分析。

skills.name: chem-conformer-search
skills.summary: Generate molecular conformers with RDKit ETKDG, relax with MLIPs, and rank by energy with Boltzmann weighting.

skills.classification_rationale: 原始 SKILL.md 是分子构象生成、松弛和能量排序；原地球环境标签无来源依据，修正为化学计算相邻簇。

skills.name: chem-db-qmof
skills.summary: Query the Quantum MOF (QMOF) database via Materials Project's MPContribs platform for DFT-computed properties (bandgap) and optimized crystal structures of Metal-Organic Frameworks.
skills.task: 计算 MOF 结构与带隙数据检索
skills.classification_rationale: 描述覆盖 QMOF 数据库中的 DFT 带隙和优化晶体结构查询，主要输出是已有计算材料记录，不是重新执行 DFT。

skills.name: chem-db-spectra
skills.summary: Search and download experimental InfraRed (IR), Mass spectra, and UV-Vis spectra data (JCAMP-DX format) for molecules.
skills.task: 检索下载实验光谱数据
skills.classification_rationale: 主要动作为从NIST Chemistry WebBook检索分子的实验光谱，主要产物为JCAMP-DX格式的IR、质谱和UV-Vis光谱文件。

skills.name: chem-dft-orca-advanced-calculation
skills.summary: Write and run custom ORCA input files for advanced electronic structure methods or settings not available through the SCINE wrapper, including multi-reference methods, excited states, relativistic effects, advanced SCF, NMR/EPR, and more.
skills.task: ORCA高级电子结构计算输入与运行
skills.classification_rationale: 编写并运行高级ORCA电子结构计算，主要产物是计算结果。

skills.name: chem-dft-orca-optimization

Retrieve alleles, MAF, variant class (SNV/indel/MNV), clinical links, cross-DB IDs (ClinVar, dbVar, 1000G). Free; 3 req/sec (10 with key). For clinical pathogenicity use clinvar-database; for population frequencies use gnomad-database.
skills.task: 遗传变异记录检索
skills.classification_rationale: 描述明确是按 rsID、基因或区域查询 dbSNP 记录并返回等位基因、频率和跨库 ID，主要动作是外部数据库检索。

skills.name: debug
skills.summary: Evidence-before-action diagnosis of failing ML experiments. Probes the system before guessing causes, process list, dmesg, GPU stats, log scrollback, checkpoint state, then states a hypothesis as a hypothesis and runs a smoke before claiming a root cause. Use when the user asks why a run is failing, diverging, OOMing, hanging, slow, producing weird metrics, has crashed, or asks to debug, diagnose, troubleshoot, or...
skills.task: 失败机器学习实验证据诊断与复现检查
skills.classification_rationale: 通过系统探测、日志和 smoke test 诊断实验失败，主要交付是带证据的验证判断。

skills.name: decision-curve-analysis
skills.summary: Use when evaluating the clinical utility of a binary prediction model from a single clinical CSV file by fitting a logistic decision-curve model, plotting decision and clinical-impact curves, and exporting summary outputs. NOT for: survival calibration, ROC-only discrimination analysis, nomogram construction, or time-to-event outcomes.
skills.task: 临床预测模型决策曲线评估
skills.classification_rationale: 描述明确限定为二分类临床预测模型的 decision curve 和 clinical-impact curve，并明确排除生存校准和 ROC-only 任务，属于模型临床效用验证。

skills.name: decision-tree-analysis
skills.summary: Use when building a decision tree model in R and generating feature importance ranking outputs. Supports classification and regression, automatic task detection, parameter validation, model evaluation summaries, and exports of feature-importance tables and figures.
skills.task: 构建决策树并分析特征重要性
skills.classification_rationale: 训练决策树模型并导出特征重要性排名表格与评估指标。

skills.name: deep-learning-content-analyzer
skills.summary: Use when the user wants to analyze a deep learning research project folder, locate core model architecture files, training/evaluation scripts, configs, experiment logs, ablation results, checkpoints, metrics, or paper-writing evidence, and summarize technical contributions into content_analysis.md for downstream scientific writing skills such as foundations, abstract, introduction, methods, results, discussion, co...
skills.task: 分析深度学习项目并提取贡献
skills.classification_rationale: 扫描深度学习项目文件夹，提取技术贡献与实验证据，产出内容分析文档供写作使用。

skills.name: deep-research
skills.summary: Adversarial multi-agent research process for producing investment-grade analysis on any topic. Dispatches parallel research agents on different angles, then critic agents to find errors and gaps, then synthesizes into a final report with fact-checking. Use when asked to deeply research a company, market, technology, or strategic question. Triggers on "deep research", "research report", "analyze [company/market/top...
skills.task: 多角度研究与批判核验综合报告
skills.classification_rationale: 多角度调查、批评者核验和事实检查最终形成研究报告，主要交付是综合结论。

skills.name: deep-research-cn
skills.summary: 通用深度研究代理团队。13代理管道，用于对任何主题进行严格的学术研究。7种模式：完整研究、快速简报、论文评审、文献综述、事实核查、苏格拉底式引导研究对话，以及带可选元分析的系统评价。涵盖研究问题制定、苏格拉底式指导、方法设计、系统文献检索、资料验证、跨资料综合、偏倚风险评估、元分析、APA 7.0 报告编写、编辑审查、唱反调挑战、伦理审查及研究后文献监控。触发条件：研究、深度研究、文献回顾、系统性回顾、元分析、PRISMA、证据综合、事实核查、引导我的研究、帮我理清思路、研究、深度研究、文献回顾、文献探讨、系统性回顾、后设分析、事实查核、引导我的研究、帮我厘清、帮我想想、我不确定要研究什幺、研究方向、研究主题。
skills.task: 中文多代理研究与证据综合报告
skills.classification_rationale: 覆盖问题制定、检索、验证、综合、偏倚评估和报告编写，主要交付是综合研究报告。

skills.name: deep-research-fact-check
skills.summary: Focused claim verification workflow for checking statistics, factual statements, timelines, and source support. Use when the main task is verifying a bounded claim rather than conducting a broad literature review or full research report.
skills.task: 有界事实主张与来源支持核验
skills.classification_rationale: 针对统计、事实、时间线和来源支持进行有界核查，主要产物是核验结论。

skills.name: deep-research-lit-review
skills.summary: Literature review workflow for mapping sources, themes, contradictions, and research gaps around a topic. Use when the user needs structured literature synthesis rather than full paper drafting or claim-by-claim fact-checking.
skills.task: 文献主题矛盾与研究空白综合
skills.classification_rationale: 围绕来源、主题、矛盾和研究空白做结构化文献综合，主要交付是综述证据图景。

skills.name: deep-research-pro
skills.summary: Multi-source deep research agent. Searches the web, synthesizes findings, and delivers cited reports. No API keys required.
skills.task: 多源检索综合并生成带引文报告
skills.classification_rationale: 搜索多源材料、综合发现并交付带引文报告，主要产物是证据综合。

skills.name: deep-research-socratic
skills.summary: Guided research clarification workflow for turning vague interests into answerable research questions, scope boundaries, and next-step plans. Use when the user needs dialogue-driven research direction rather than a full research report.

skills.name: deep-research-systematic-review

skills.name: deep-search
skills.summary: Multi-platform deep research skill for exhaustive, multi-faceted investigation with config-driven routing, portable adapters, and auditable strict mode.
skills.task: 多平台深度检索与综合报告
skills.classification_rationale: 通过多平台代理架构进行深度检索与交叉验证，产出全景分析报告。

skills.name: deep-trawler
skills.summary: Deep research workflow that produces comprehensive multi-page reports. Trigger on "deep research", "deep dive", "research report", "trawl", or "DeepTrawler". Combines Perplexity deep research API with source extraction and synthesis into structured research documents. Do NOT use for quick web searches, simple fact-checking, or questions answerable by regular web_search. This is for comprehensive research only (~$0...
skills.task: 深度检索与综合研究报告生成
skills.classification_rationale: 执行多阶段深度检索与来源提取，综合生成结构化多页研究报告。

skills.name: deepchem

Use for property prediction (ADMET, toxicity) with traditional ML or GNNs when you want extensive featurization options and MoleculeNet benchmarks. Best for quick experiments with pre-trained models, diverse molecular representations. For graph-first PyTorch workflows use torchdrug; for benchmark datasets use pytdc.
skills.task: 分子机器学习建模与预测
skills.classification_rationale: 提供分子特征化与预训练模型，执行分子性质预测与模型训练评估。

skills.name: deepdive
skills.summary: Meta-research под вопрос или решение. Веб-поиск, академические источники, Q&A отчёт; каждый источник — отдельный файл с цитатами и метаданными для повторного использования. Использовать когда нужна основа под решение, для деск-ресёрча, валидации гипотезы или чтобы понять как устроен X. Триггеры — "deep research", "глубокое исследование", "проведи ресёрч", "сделай ресёрч", "изучи тему", "разбери тему", "исследуй",...
skills.task: 多步元研究与综合问答报告

skills.classification_rationale: 主要动作是根据用户意图将DeePMD请求路由到训练或推理子技能，主要产物为路由决策。

skills.name: deg-screening-analysis
skills.summary: Use when screening differentially expressed genes from a bulk expression matrix between two user-specified groups, producing DEG tables, a volcano plot, and a clustered heatmap. Triggers include DEG analysis, volcano plot, clustered heatmap, limma-based two-group comparison, and case-vs-control screening. NOT for single-cell RNA-seq, multi-group contrasts, count-model workflows such as DESeq2/edgeR, or non-express...

Supports end-to-end research pipelines with customizable age...

skills.classification_rationale: 按QUADAS-2工具评估诊断准确性研究的偏倚风险与适用性，主要产物为结构化质量评估报告。

skills.name: subagent-driven-review
skills.summary: Subagent-Driven Literature Review

skills.name: survey-generation

skills.task: 学术综述论文写作
skills.classification_rationale: 描述使用并行大纲、RAG 分节写作、引文验证和连贯性增强来生成完整 survey paper，主要产物是可提交的综述稿件。

skills.name: survey-writer
skills.summary: 综述写手 (Survey Writer) — 负责按模板撰写综述论文各章节。 当被研究主管或论文分析师指派写作时激活。基于论文分析卡片和对比表， 按学术写作规范撰写完整的综述论文。
skills.task: 综述论文章节撰写与整合

skills.name: symbolic-equation
skills.summary: Discover scientific equations from data using LLM-guided evolutionary search (LLM-SR). Multi-island algorithm with softmax-based cluster sampling, island reset, and LLM-proposed equation mutations. Use for symbolic regression and equation discovery.
skills.task: 数据驱动的科学方程发现
skills.classification_rationale: 主要动作为通过进化搜索发现方程，主要产物为拟合数据的科学方程。

skills.name: synthetic-biology-analyze-bifurcation-diagram

skills.classification_rationale: 主要动作为对动力系统进行分岔分析，主要产物为分岔图。

skills.classification_rationale: 主要动作为优化DNA/RNA序列密码子，主要产物为优化后的序列。

skills.name: systematic-literature-review
skills.summary: Use this skill when the user wants a systematic literature review, survey, or synthesis across multiple academic papers on a topic. Also covers annotated bibliographies and cross-paper comparisons. Searches arXiv and outputs reports in APA, IEEE, or BibTeX format. Not for single-paper tasks — use academic-paper-review for reviewing one paper.
skills.task: 系统综述与跨论文证据合成
skills.classification_rationale: 描述明确面向 systematic review、survey、synthesis、annotated bibliography 和跨论文比较，主要输出是证据合成报告。

skills.name: systematic-review
skills.summary: You must use this when conducting PRISMA-standard systematic reviews, protocol development, or Risk of Bias assessment.
skills.task: PRISMA综述协议与偏倚风险综合
skills.classification_rationale: 用于 PRISMA 系统综述、协议和 Risk of Bias 评估，主要交付是系统证据综合。

skills.name: table-generation
skills.summary: Generate publication-quality LaTeX tables from experimental results. Convert JSON/CSV data to booktabs-styled tables with bold best results, multi-row layouts, and proper captions. Use when creating result tables, comparison tables, or ablation tables for papers.
skills.task: 实验结果表格生成
skills.classification_rationale: 将实验结果转换为可发表的 LaTeX 表格，生成 booktabs 样式的表格。

skills.name: table-narrative-writer

skills.task: 表格数据转叙述文本
skills.classification_rationale: 将生物医学表格内容转换为稿件叙述文本，强调模式识别与证据边界。

skills.name: target-journal-matcher
skills.summary: Matches your study to appropriate journals based on topic, design, and evidence strength. Use when deciding where to submit a manuscript, comparing journal options by impact factor vs scope fit vs method tolerance, or finding a realistic submission target after a rejection. Also triggers on "where should I submit this paper", "which journal is best for my study", "find journals for my manuscript", "is this a good...
skills.task: 研究稿件目标期刊匹配
skills.classification_rationale: 根据研究主题、设计和证据强度匹配目标期刊，产出期刊推荐列表。

skills.name: technical-reviewer
skills.summary: Review a scientific manuscript, method, experiment plan, results, or rebuttal for technical correctness, claim-evidence support, methodology, baselines, metrics, statistics, assumptions, interpretation, reproducibility, and reviewer-critical rigor issues. Do not use for grammar-only editing or bibliography metadata checks.
skills.task: 稿件技术正确性审查
skills.classification_rationale: 审查科学稿件的技术正确性和主张-证据支持，产出技术审查报告。

skills.classification_rationale: 优化稿件的标题和摘要以提升信息密度和投稿契合度，产出优化后的标题与摘要。

skills.name: tooluniverse-acmg-variant-classification

Integrates ADMET-AI predictions, SwissADME drug-likeness, PubChemTox experimental toxicity, ChEMBL clinical data, Lipinski rule-of-five, and CYP interaction data. Use for drug-likeness assessment, BBB penetration, bioavailability, hepatotoxicity prediction, ADME/PK profiling, or screening compound librari...

skills.name: tooluniverse-adverse-event-detection
skills.summary: Detect and analyze adverse drug event signals using FDA FAERS reports, drug labels, and disproportionality statistics (PRR, ROR, IC). Distinct from drug-safety analysis (use tooluniverse-pharmacovigilance for drugs).

Use for senescence-pathway analysis, age-related disease genetics, senolytic-target discovery, and centenarian-genetics queries. Distinguishes correlative...
skills.task: 衰老机制证据综合分析
skills.classification_rationale: 检索衰老相关基因、通路与药物数据库并综合生成衰老生物学研究报告。

skills.name: tooluniverse-antibody-engineering
skills.summary: Therapeutic antibody engineering and optimization, lead-to-clinical-candidate. Covers sequence humanization (germline alignment, framework retention), affinity maturation, developability (aggregation, stability, PTMs), structure modeling (AlphaFold/PDB CDR analysis), immunogenicity prediction, and manufacturing feasibility. Use for biologic-drug optimization, mAb design review, biosimilar engineering, and clinical...
skills.task: 治疗性抗体序列人源化与候选优化设计
skills.classification_rationale: 围绕人源化、框架和候选优化形成抗体设计方案，主要交付是候选设计。

skills.name: tooluniverse-binder-discovery
skills.summary: Discover novel small-molecule binders for protein targets using structure-based and ligand-based screening. Use for hit identification, virtual screening, target-to-compounds workflows, and lead-finding before commit-to-medchem.
skills.task: 小分子结合剂虚拟筛选

skills.classification_rationale: 检索OncoTree本体库将自由文本肿瘤描述映射为标准化分类代码。

Use for TCGA-BRCA-style cohort studies, mutation prevalence by cancer type, survival-by-mutation analysis, and pan-cancer driver discovery. Always cancer-type-specific (don't use pan-cancer counts without cohort context).

Use for tumor-board variant calls, somatic-mutation actionability assessment, and treatment selection. Alway...
skills.task: 癌症变异临床证据综合
skills.classification_rationale: 综合多源临床数据库证据生成癌症体细胞突变临床解释报告。

skills.name: tooluniverse-cell-line-profiling
skills.summary: Cancer cell-line selection and profiling for experimental model choice. Cross-references DepMap, Cellosaurus, COSMIC, PharmacoDB to deliver identity verification, mutation/CNV profile, gene dependencies, drug sensitivities, and druggable targets. Use to answer 'which cell line should I use for studying gene X?' or 'is this cell line a good model for cancer Y?'. Outputs ranked recommendations with rationale, growth...
skills.task: 实验细胞模型选择与画像
skills.classification_rationale: 描述交付细胞系身份、突变/CNV、依赖性、药敏和可成药靶点，用于实验模型选择；数据库交叉查询是手段，研究设计决策是主要产物。

skills.name: tooluniverse-chemical-compound-retrieval
skills.summary: Retrieve chemical compound data from PubChem and ChEMBL with disambiguation, cross-referencing, and stereochemistry handling. Use for resolving compound names to SMILES/InChI/CID/ChEMBL IDs (including OPSIN deterministic IUPAC-name-to-structure parsing), fetching molecular properties, distinguishing isomers/stereo forms, and cross-validating identity across databases. Always use English compound names; flags ambig...
skills.task: 化合物身份与结构跨库检索
skills.classification_rationale: 描述重点是名称消歧、SMILES/InChI/CID/ChEMBL ID 解析、跨库交叉引用和立体化学处理，主要产物是化合物身份与数据库记录。

skills.name: tooluniverse-chemical-safety
skills.summary: Chemical safety and toxicology assessment integrating ADMET-AI predictions, CTD toxicogenomics, PubChemTox experimental data, GHS/IARC hazard classification, and exposure-context analysis. skills.summary: Find commercial sources for chemical compounds — PubChem/ChEMBL identity resolution then vendor catalog search across ZINC, Enamine, eMolecules, Mcule. Use for chemical procurement, virtual library curation, and 'where can I buy X' questions for synthesis planning.

skills.name: tooluniverse-claude-code-plugin

Use for first-time plugin install, troubleshooting plugin not loading, verifying MCP server connection, listing API key requirements, or configuring auto-update.
skills.task: 科研工具环境配置安装
skills.classification_rationale: 提供ToolUniverse插件的安装、验证与故障排除指南以配置科研环境。

skills.name: tooluniverse-clinical-data-integration
skills.summary: End-to-end drug safety review integrating FDA labels, FAERS adverse event reports, PRR/ROR disproportionality, pharmacogenomic biomarkers, clinical trial data, and published literature. Use for regulatory drug safety reviews, comprehensive pharmacovigilance reports, label-vs-real-world AE comparison, and clinical decision support for drug safety.

Use for evidence-graded treatment recommendations, dosing protocols, screening guidance, and authoritative-source-prioritized clinical guidance (NICE/WHO ranked above society guidelines).

skills.classification_rationale: 从NICE、WHO等权威来源检索并获取临床实践指南。

skills.name: tooluniverse-clinical-risk-scoring

Covers CHA2DS2-VASc (AF stroke risk), HAS-BLED (bleeding on anticoagulation), CURB-65 (pneumonia severity / admit decision), qSOFA (sepsis screen), Child-Pu...
skills.task: 个体临床风险评分计算与医学解释
skills.classification_rationale: 计算经过验证的临床风险评分并对照解释表解释个体结果，主要交付是领域判断。

skills.name: tooluniverse-clinical-trial-design
skills.summary: Strategic clinical trial design feasibility assessment. Analyzes 6 dimensions (endpoint, population, comparator, effect size, duration, regulatory pathway) using precedent trials and FDA guidance. Produces enrollment projections, endpoint recommendations, and approval-pathway analysis. Use for trial-protocol design, power/sample-size estimation, comparator selection, and FDA submission strategy. Driven by preceden...
skills.task: 临床试验终点人群效应量与监管路径设计
skills.classification_rationale: 从终点、受试者、对照、效应量、时长和监管路径评估试验可行性。

Searches ClinicalTrials.gov, the EU CTIS register (European/EEA trials), AND the ISRCTN registry (UK/international) plus cross-references CIViC, OpenTargets, ChEMBL, and FDA l...
skills.task: 患者特征与临床试验匹配

skills.name: tooluniverse-comparative-genomics

skills.name: tooluniverse-computational-biophysics

Covers JSON-config tools (simplest, no code), Python class tools (REST/SOAP/GraphQL APIs, computational logic), and best-practices for return schemas. Use for wrapping new APIs, adding domain-specific computations, or contributing tools to the registry.

skills.name: tooluniverse-data-integration-analysis
